who I am

About me

I'm a final-year Computer Science & Engineering student at SNS College of Technology, Tirupur, passionate about building web applications and intelligent ML systems that solve real problems.

Through three internships at Ether Infotech, Nxtlogic, and Profenaa Technologies, I've worked across the full stack — from HTML/CSS pages to React.js portals to Streamlit ML apps.

Currently seeking Full Stack Developer and React JS Developer roles where I can contribute, grow, and build things people actually use.
